message:
feat(daemon): add core loop with EWMA triggers and escalation logic

Implements dormant monitoring daemon primitives (Plan §3.7):
- Core tick-based loop with injectable metrics and escalation callbacks
- EWMA-based trigger detection (load, memory, orphan) with sustained-
  window rules, cooldown, and backoff to prevent flapping
- Escalation decision logic with lock contention handling and cooldown
  enforcement
- Inbox summary generation for deferred escalations
- Full serialization support for state persistence across restarts

24 tests across 3 modules (mod, triggers, escalation).

Closes: process_triage-nh7p

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
